auth.label: API Key
auth.description: cloudlayer.io API key sent with the X-API-Key header. Find and manage your keys in the official cloudlayer.io dashboard: https://beta-app.cloudlayer.io

actions.name: create_html_pdf_job
actions.description: Create an asynchronous cloudlayer.io HTML-to-PDF job from base64-encoded HTML and return the new job status.

format.description: The output page format such as `a4` or `letter`.

top.description: The top page margin, such as `0.5in` or `20px`.

right.description: The right page margin, such as `0.5in` or `20px`.

bottom.description: The bottom page margin, such as `0.5in` or `20px`.

left.description: The left page margin, such as `0.5in` or `20px`.

margin.description: The optional page margin overrides forwarded to cloudlayer.io.

printBackground.description: Whether the generated PDF should include background graphics and colors.

waitUntil.description: The page load event to wait for before rendering, such as `load` or `networkidle0`.

timeout.description: The maximum page load time in milliseconds before rendering fails.

filename.description: The optional output filename hint for the generated PDF.

html.description: The base64-encoded HTML document to render as a PDF.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a cloudlayer.io HTML-to-PDF job.

uid.description: The cloudlayer.io user identifier that owns the job.

type.description: The upstream job type such as `html-pdf` or `url-pdf`.

status.description: The current job status such as `pending`, `success`, or `error`.

params.description: The upstream request parameters recorded for the job when available.

size.description: The generated output size in bytes when available.

processTime.description: The upstream processing time in milliseconds when available.

apiCreditCost.description: The upstream API credit cost charged for this job when available.

workerName.description: The upstream worker identifier that processed the job.

timestamp.description: The Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the job was created.

actions.name: create_template_pdf_job
actions.description: Create an asynchronous cloudlayer.io template-to-PDF job from a base64-encoded template and JSON data.

format.description: The output page format such as `a4` or `letter`.

top.description: The top page margin, such as `0.5in` or `20px`.

right.description: The right page margin, such as `0.5in` or `20px`.

bottom.description: The bottom page margin, such as `0.5in` or `20px`.

left.description: The left page margin, such as `0.5in` or `20px`.

margin.description: The optional page margin overrides forwarded to cloudlayer.io.

printBackground.description: Whether the generated PDF should include background graphics and colors.

waitUntil.description: The page load event to wait for before rendering, such as `load` or `networkidle0`.

timeout.description: The maximum page load time in milliseconds before rendering fails.

filename.description: The optional output filename hint for the generated PDF.

template.description: The base64-encoded template source to render as a PDF.

data.description: The JSON object used to populate the Nunjucks template variables.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a cloudlayer.io template-to-PDF job.

uid.description: The cloudlayer.io user identifier that owns the job.

type.description: The upstream job type such as `html-pdf` or `url-pdf`.

status.description: The current job status such as `pending`, `success`, or `error`.

params.description: The upstream request parameters recorded for the job when available.

size.description: The generated output size in bytes when available.

processTime.description: The upstream processing time in milliseconds when available.

apiCreditCost.description: The upstream API credit cost charged for this job when available.

workerName.description: The upstream worker identifier that processed the job.

timestamp.description: The Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the job was created.

actions.name: create_url_pdf_job
actions.description: Create an asynchronous cloudlayer.io URL-to-PDF job for one public webpage and return the new job status.

format.description: The output page format such as `a4` or `letter`.

top.description: The top page margin, such as `0.5in` or `20px`.

right.description: The right page margin, such as `0.5in` or `20px`.

bottom.description: The bottom page margin, such as `0.5in` or `20px`.

left.description: The left page margin, such as `0.5in` or `20px`.

margin.description: The optional page margin overrides forwarded to cloudlayer.io.

printBackground.description: Whether the generated PDF should include background graphics and colors.

waitUntil.description: The page load event to wait for before rendering, such as `load` or `networkidle0`.

timeout.description: The maximum page load time in milliseconds before rendering fails.

filename.description: The optional output filename hint for the generated PDF.

url.description: The public webpage URL to render as a PDF.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a cloudlayer.io URL-to-PDF job.

uid.description: The cloudlayer.io user identifier that owns the job.

type.description: The upstream job type such as `html-pdf` or `url-pdf`.

status.description: The current job status such as `pending`, `success`, or `error`.

params.description: The upstream request parameters recorded for the job when available.

size.description: The generated output size in bytes when available.

processTime.description: The upstream processing time in milliseconds when available.

apiCreditCost.description: The upstream API credit cost charged for this job when available.

workerName.description: The upstream worker identifier that processed the job.

timestamp.description: The Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the job was created.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Get the current cloudlayer.io account usage, limits, and job totals for the API key.

inputSchema.description: No input parameters are required for retrieving the current account.

subscription.description: The subscription price identifier for the current account.

subType.description: The billing model reported by cloudlayer.io, such as `limit` or `usage`.

subActive.description: Whether the current subscription is active.

calls.description: The API calls used in the current billing period.

callsLimit.description: The maximum API calls allowed in the current billing period.

credit.description: The remaining API credits when the account uses usage-based billing.

bytesTotal.description: The total generated output bytes in the current billing period.

bytesLimit.description: The maximum generated output bytes allowed in the current billing period.

computeTimeTotal.description: The total rendering compute time used in milliseconds for the current billing period.

computeTimeLimit.description: The maximum rendering compute time allowed in milliseconds for the current billing period.

storageUsed.description: The currently used cloud storage in bytes for stored generated assets.

storageLimit.description: The maximum cloud storage allowed in bytes for stored generated assets.

totalJobs.description: The total completed jobs for the current billing period.

successJobs.description: The number of successfully completed jobs.

account.description: The normalized cloudlayer.io account usage snapshot.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for retrieving the current cloudlayer.io account.

actions.name: get_asset
actions.description: Get one generated cloudlayer.io asset by asset ID, including its direct download URL.

assetId.description: The cloudlayer.io asset identifier to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one generated cloudlayer.io asset.

jobId.description: The job identifier that produced the asset.

ext.description: The generated file extension such as `pdf` or `png`.

size.description: The generated file size in bytes.

url.description: The pre-authenticated download URL for the generated file.

timestamp.description: The Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the asset was created.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for retrieving one cloudlayer.io asset.

actions.name: get_job
actions.description: Get one cloudlayer.io job by job ID to inspect status, timing, and request metadata.

jobId.description: The cloudlayer.io job identifier to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one cloudlayer.io job.

uid.description: The cloudlayer.io user identifier that owns the job.

type.description: The upstream job type such as `html-pdf` or `url-pdf`.

status.description: The current job status such as `pending`, `success`, or `error`.

params.description: The upstream request parameters recorded for the job when available.

size.description: The generated output size in bytes when available.

processTime.description: The upstream processing time in milliseconds when available.

apiCreditCost.description: The upstream API credit cost charged for this job when available.

workerName.description: The upstream worker identifier that processed the job.

timestamp.description: The Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the job was created.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for retrieving one cloudlayer.io job.

actions.name: list_assets
actions.description: List recent generated cloudlayer.io assets for the current account with optional cursor pagination.

limit.description: The number of assets to return, between 1 and 100.

startAfterId.description: The asset ID to paginate after for cursor-based listing.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing recent cloudlayer.io assets.

jobId.description: The job identifier that produced the asset.

ext.description: The generated file extension such as `pdf` or `png`.

size.description: The generated file size in bytes.

url.description: The pre-authenticated download URL for the generated file.

timestamp.description: The Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the asset was created.

assets.description: The recent cloudlayer.io assets returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for listing cloudlayer.io assets.

actions.name: list_jobs
actions.description: List recent cloudlayer.io jobs for the current account with optional cursor pagination.

limit.description: The number of jobs to return, between 1 and 100.

startAfterId.description: The job ID to paginate after for cursor-based listing.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing recent cloudlayer.io jobs.

uid.description: The cloudlayer.io user identifier that owns the job.

type.description: The upstream job type such as `html-pdf` or `url-pdf`.

status.description: The current job status such as `pending`, `success`, or `error`.

params.description: The upstream request parameters recorded for the job when available.

size.description: The generated output size in bytes when available.

processTime.description: The upstream processing time in milliseconds when available.

apiCreditCost.description: The upstream API credit cost charged for this job when available.

workerName.description: The upstream worker identifier that processed the job.

timestamp.description: The Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the job was created.

jobs.description: The recent cloudlayer.io jobs returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for listing cloudlayer.io jobs.
